title: Plunger, Long Handle Plunger, Super Strong Durable Plunger for Kitchens and Bathrooms, Extreme Suction Sink Plunger Opener Bathtub, Shower, Sink (10 CM)
features: HIGH QUALITY - Our sink unblocker tool has a heavy duty cup and its made of high quality rubber, which is soft and durable.
EASY TO USE - Align the suction cup with the drain hole, increase the pressure several times, suck the air inside the clogged pipes
HIGHLY EFFECTIVE - The powerful dipping action of our toilet unblocker tools, quickly clears drains and removes sink blockages without using harsh chemicals.
WIDE USE - The unblocking drain release tool can be used as a shower drain cleaner, a kitchen sink drain cleaner, a bathtub drain cleaner and a toilet pump.
A MUST HAVE - No more clogged pipes with our toilet plunger unblocker heavy duty, an indispensable tool in your homeware pantry.
description: Product Description What types of blockages can this plunger handle? The TIJAR long handle plunger is designed for sinks, bathtubs, showers, and kitchen drains, delivering powerful suction to clear water flow blockages quickly. Is the handle comfortable and easy to use? Yes, the long ergonomic handle provides excellent grip and leverage, allowing you to apply strong plunging force without strain. How durable is this plunger? Made from super-strong, high-quality materials, it is built to last, resisting wear and tear even with regular use in kitchens and bathrooms. Is it suitable for both home and commercial use? Yes, the heavy-duty design makes it ideal for domestic use as well as in commercial kitchens, bathrooms, and maintenance settings. Is this plunger easy to store? Yes, the compact plunger head and slim handle design make it easy to store in kitchen cupboards, bathroom cabinets, or cleaning supply areas without taking up much space. Material Sturdy Plastic Handle Size Compact head size for versatile use, paired with a long handle for greater plunging power and reach. Design High Suction Efficiency - Specially shaped plunger cup creates a tight seal for maximum suction, making clearing blockages quick and effective. Use Multi-Purpose Drain Opener - Suitable for sinks, bathtubs, showers, and kitchen drains, offering a versatile solution for common household blockages.
